questions.question: Define the Selection Sort algorithm and explain its time complexity. How does it differ from Bubble Sort in terms of its performance?
questions.hint: Outline the steps involved inSelection Sort

questions.question: Write a step-by-step algorithm for implementing the Selection Sort on an unsorted array of 5 elements. Then, calculate the time complexity of this algorithm for an array of 'n' elements. Why does its time complexity remain O(n^2)?
questions.hint: Use 'n' as a variable to represent the number of elements in the array

questions.question: Compare the efficiency of Selection Sort and Bubble Sort on large datasets. What are the advantages and disadvantages of each algorithm? Provide at least two scenarios in which one algorithm might be preferred over the other.
questions.hint: Consider factors such as implementation simplicity and real-world data
